name: Pasta with Peanut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions, omitting salt and fat; drain and keep warm.
2. Cut the white portion of onions into 2-inch pieces; reserve the green tops for another use. Cut squash in half lengthwise, and then cut each half into slices. Remove and discard seeds from bell pepper, and cut the pepper into thin strips.
3. Cook vegetables in a saucepan in boiling water to cover for 3 minutes; drain vegetables and set aside.
4. Pour oil into a large skillet; heat over medium until hot. Add garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute. Add peanut butter, stirring until smooth. Stir in soy sauce and the next 3 ingredients.
5. Add vegetables to the skillet, and toss gently to coat. Remove vegetables from the skillet with a slotted spoon.
6. Add spaghetti to the sauce in the skillet, tossing to coat. Transfer to a serving plate, and top with vegetables. Serve immediately.
